headline: Shafni Shafeek wins The Young Digital Entrepreneur of The Year

content.text: Shafni Shafeek and the award record

Shafni Shafeek is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of The Young Digital Entrepreneur of The Year. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Shafni Shafeek, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

CyberHustle identifies Shafni Shafeek as CEO and co-founder, and LinkedIn corroborates the personal profile. The GBE archive records the Young Digital Entrepreneur award. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
